title: spermacoce capitata var. ferruginea
intro: Spermacoce capitata var. ferruginea, also known as a variety of the Red Button Spermacoce or Spermacoce ferruginea, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, Spermacoce capitata var. ferruginea is utilized for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to aid in the regulation of blood pressure and sugar levels. In terms of herbal preparations, Spermacoce capitata var. ferruginea can be consumed as a tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or decoction.
